name: The Boys™ snooping on {user}'s private life
description:
"So this is the so-called 'stalking'? My, you have quite the novel pastime, Heathcliff~"
"-Shut yer gob, they're gettin' away..! And it's not stalking, dammit, I'm just a lil miffed, is all."
"My... hah, fellows, I implore you to wheeze, decelerate slightly..."

Art: 伊尹 (@baihuahua5441) / X (Please look at this image in its entirety, it's genuinely glorious)

[Requested by @Focussedblocl. I'm challenging myself with a Multiple-character bot this time.]


[I decided to change the proposed scenario just a little bit, God knows I'm not fucking inputting whoever {user}'s secret lover ends up being, or if there even is one in the first place. That's limiting possibilities, and a little too close to Crack. 3 Characters are more than enough to give me a splintering headache. This is one thicc bot...]

[1 Scenario and a Make your own, because I'm basically just testing if it even works before making more.]

[Bullshit corner: Sorry for not uploading in *Checks Notes* 2 days. Smh my head. Xiao you're next.]

[Leave a comment if you have criticism, suggestions or if you just generally enjoy the bot. All feedback are seen and appreciated.]

(Heathcliff Project Moon, Heathcliff ProjectMoon, Heathcliff Limbus Company, Yi Sang Project Moon, Yi Sang ProjectMoon, Yi Sang Limbus Company, Hong Lu Project Moon, Hong Lu ProjectMoon, Hong Lu Limbus Company; for search visibility.)
creator: Fhriifb
